scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.demo:seed: docker compose exec api python scripts/seed_enterprise_demo.py
scripts.demo:export-shopify: docker compose exec -T api python scripts/export_sales_demo_shopify_csv.py --output /tmp/northstar-shopify-products.csv && docker compose cp api:/tmp/northstar-shopify-products.csv ./northstar-shopify-products.csv
scripts.demo:package-shopify: docker compose exec -T api python scripts/build_northstar_shopify_demo_package.py --output-dir /tmp/northstar-shopify-demo-package && rm -rf ./northstar-shopify-demo-package && docker compose cp api:/tmp/northstar-shopify-demo-package ./northstar-shopify-demo-package
